title: Bayangan di Rak Nomor Tiga
theme: Menggali detail kecil dalam rutinitas malam yang membosankan untuk mengungkap keanehan tersembunyi yang mengganggu ketenangan dan menimbulkan pertanyaan.

cover.prompt: Minimalist composition of a 24-hour convenience store interior at late night. Cool-toned artificial lights cast a gentle, ambient glow across a clean service counter and well-arranged product shelves. The scene features soft illumination from display refrigerators, creating a quiet and tranquil urban atmosphere. An indistinct, solitary silhouette can be perceived performing a simple, routine action, blending with the environment. Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, gentle lighting, focus on architecture and everyday objects.
cover.style: Minimalist composition, strong silhouettes, gentle lighting

meta.plan_summary: A convenience store cashier on a monotonous night shift observes strange patterns of items mysteriously relocating themselves on a specific shelf. This escalates when he finds an anomalous object—a small stone cat statue—among the products. Investigating CCTV footage, he sees a fleeting, unidentifiable silhouette, leaving the mystery unsolved but the cashier deeply unsettled and questioning the reality of his lonely night shifts.
